mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_RESERVATION (RESERVATION_ID, FLIGHT_ID, MEMBER_ID, PASSENGER_NAME) VALUES (TRV_RESERVATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{flightId}, #{memberId}, #{passengerName})
mapper.select: SELECT R.RESERVATION_ID AS reservationId, R.FLIGHT_ID AS flightId, R.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, R.PASSENGER_NAME AS passengerName, R.RESERVE_DATE AS reserveDate, R.STATUS AS status, F.AIRLINE AS airline, F.DEPARTURE AS departure, F.ARRIVAL AS arrival, F.DEPART_TIME AS departTime, F.FLIGHT_DATE AS flightDate, F.PRICE AS price FROM TRV_RESERVATION R JOIN TRV_FLIGHT F ON R.FLIGHT_ID = F.FLIGHT_ID WHERE R.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY R.RESERVATION_ID DESC

SELECT RESERVATION_ID AS reservationId, FLIGHT_ID AS flightId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, PASSENGER_NAME AS passengerName, RESERVE_DATE AS reserveDate, STATUS AS status FROM TRV_RESERVATION WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId}
